_note: js/data.js の SBR.MANIFEST と同期。status を placeholder→ready にし、file の PNG を配置すると自動で差し替わる。HEROは若い女性営業。size: キャラ1024x1536 / 背景1536x1024。

hero_neutral.prompt: Vibrant anime illustration, full body, a cheerful Japanese woman in her early 20s, rookie sales representative, neat navy blue business suit with a small company badge, shoulder-length brown hair, big sparkling eyes, confident friendly smile, standing energetically holding a tablet, bright cel-shaded anime style, clean vivid colors, dynamic exciting JRPG character art, standing on a flat solid chroma-key green background (#00b140), the green fills the entire background edge to edge, no shadow on the ground
